Enum.name: eEventType
Enum.help: The type of event. This can be used for creating an event mask

List.name: EventList
List.help: List of events types for notification

PropertyStringList.name: portList
PropertyStringList.description: List of port ids to be watched

PropertyBoolean.help: If true, first values for the notifying states will be sent as an event, otherwise the events will be sent only on transition
PropertyBoolean.name: needInitialValues

Method2.name: SetEvents
Method2.help: Sets the port states to be watched

Argument.name: eventList
Argument.help: Describes for what events the user needs notifications

Method2.name: Apply
Method2.help: Sends the current configuration to the chassis

Method2.name: Destroy
Method2.help: Unregisters from HwManager and destroys this object

Event.name: StateChanged
Event.help: event rised because a port changed its state

Argument.name: eventType
Argument.help: Specifies what port state has changed

Argument.name: oldValue
Argument.help: State value before this state change

Argument.name: currentValue
Argument.help: State value after this state change.
